title: Kaworus choice to
wikitext:
[]: [SPOILERS] Kaworu's choice to...             Quote Post by TK421 » Fri May 03, 2013 4:50 pm Wear the DSS Choker. Why do you think he put it on himself instead of just taking it off of Shinji and throwing it away? Why do you think he wanted to die?

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Fri May 03, 2013 4:57 pm 1. Taking Shinji's burden and gain his trust 2. Fail-safe in case shit happens as it did 3. He though it was an engagement ring that goes around the neck

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri May 03, 2013 5:04 pm Already covered in this thread , but I'll be nice and let this one live for now.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Fri May 03, 2013 5:07 pm Fireball wrote: 3. He though it was an engagement ring that goes around the neck

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Fri May 03, 2013 5:24 pm Anybody else thought either boy looked really hot with that collar on? Half the time as I watched it on Shinji I honestly wondered if it was intentionally for fetish appeal. Anyway, I have been wondering this myself and I don't have any answers yet, but I remember what I was feeling at the time. It seemed clear that one reason he put the collar on himself was as a gesture to gain Shinji's trust, but Kaworu said he had been planning to take it from Shinji eventually anyway, as if it were part of some plan. In addition to this, Kaworu seemed genuinely blindsided by the switchout of the spears. What had his plan been originally, then? Furthermore, the notion is that Kaworu sacrificed himself to prevent Fourth Impact. Does that mean he triggered the DSS choker intentionally? But what other purpose could he have meant it for? The more I think about it the less I understand!

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Fri May 03, 2013 6:12 pm Well, it is implied that part of the reason why shit went wrong was that Kaworu was Angel matter ("It's not your fault. I was the trigger. It's because I became the 13th angel..."), and he was obviously aware of that and taking precautions for such a case.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Fri May 03, 2013 6:24 pm Kendrix wrote: Well, it is implied that part of the reason why shit went wrong was that Kaworu was Angel matter ("It's not your fault. I was the trigger. It's because I became the 13th angel..."), and he was obviously aware of that and taking precautions for such a case.

[]:             Quote Post by BC Baron » Fri May 03, 2013 8:19 pm ^ Wasn't he kinda, sorta the embodiment of both the first and seventeenth angels in the original series?

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Fri May 03, 2013 8:21 pm BC Baron wrote: ^ Wasn't he kinda, sorta the embodiment of both the first and seventeenth angels in the original series?

[]:             Quote Post by K40s » Fri May 03, 2013 8:54 pm Monk Ed wrote: Kaworu said he had been planning to take it from Shinji eventually anyway, as if it were part of some plan

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Fri May 03, 2013 9:11 pm K40s wrote: when did he say that? I was under the impression that Kaworu was planning to commit suicide at some point anyway so wearing the collar just made thing easier for him.

[]:             Quote Post by BC Baron » Fri May 03, 2013 11:25 pm Monk Ed wrote: Yes, I've pointed that out elsewhere and others probably have too. What's that got to do with this topic though?

[]:             Quote Post by K40s » Sat May 04, 2013 2:07 am ElMariachi wrote: When he took off the DSS Choker from Shinji to put it on him, he said that the CHoker was initially created for him and that he planned to take it from him sooner or later. Which also imply that he did planned to die sooner or later, as he's still an Angel and must be destroyed to assure the Lilin victory.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Sat May 04, 2013 2:08 am Maybe this difference needs to be mentioned in the translation thread, if it hasn't already?

[]:             Quote Post by DSlayerZX » Sat May 04, 2013 2:21 am K40s wrote: *checks current github translation*wow, this is new, the subs I got from the github a few days ago, say:which are very different, in the former they are talking about the DSS chocker while in the latter about Kaworu himself, also there is the implication that Kaworu was made by the Lilin like Rei was...

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Sat May 04, 2013 4:32 am Wait a minute... Script wrote: 01:01:55 {Shinji} They said if I pilot, I'll die. 01:01:59 {Shinji} I don't care about Eva anymore. 01:02:09 {Kaworu} I understand. 01:02:10 {Kaworu} For you, I will shoulder the burden of the Lilin's curse and the risk of Eva's Awakening.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sat May 04, 2013 5:45 am Monk Ed wrote: The only part that's mysterious is how he planned to activate the choker to sacrifice himself, unless perhaps the choker reacts automatically to the awakening of an Eva, or he used ATF hax or something.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat May 04, 2013 10:03 am Monk Ed wrote: Maybe this difference needs to be mentioned in the translation thread, if it hasn't already?

[]:             Quote Post by TK421 » Sat May 04, 2013 10:19 am Monk Ed wrote: Wait a minute... All of a sudden when I reread Kaworu's line it just kind of seemed obvious to me (in a "why was this even a mystery again?" way) as to why he put on the choker. I mean, he explains it right here: I will shoulder the (...) risk of Eva's awakening. In other words, he's putting it on so that if something goes wrong and the Eva "awakens" like Unit 01 did, causing unintended havoc, he'll be able to sacrifice his life to prevent a (complete) Fourth Impact, and that's exactly what winds up happening . The only part that's mysterious is how he planned to activate the choker to sacrifice himself, unless perhaps the choker reacts automatically to the awakening of an Eva, or he used ATF hax or something. Maybe we've been way overthinking this and somehow missed his direct explanation that was right in front of our faces. He didn't put the choker on intending to die, he put it on as an insurance policy for the sake of humanity, for exactly the same reason that Wille put the choker on Shinji in the first place . And he winds up using it for exactly its intended purpose. Think about it: If Kaworu hadn't put that choker on, what would have happened? Maybe Fourth Impact would have destroyed the world. Key to this interpretation relies on exactly what it means for an Eva to awaken and how that's different from what Kaworu seemed to intend by retrieving the spears, but it seems to relate to having the Eva go out of the pilots' control.

[]:             Quote Post by Yaywalter » Sat May 04, 2013 10:24 am ElMariachi wrote: The DSS Choker has a function that automatically detects an Awakening : when Ritsuko explain to Shinji what the DSS Coker is, on the left of the screen you can see a list of its functions. One the them is called "Awakening Analysis Mode". You can't make it clearer.

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Fri May 03, 2013 4:57 pm 1. Taking Shinji's burden and gain his trust 2. Fail-safe in case
